testcase.name: test_tenant_sees_info_request_message

failure.message:
AssertionError: status should stay awaiting_landlord_confirmation after request-info, got pending assert 'pending' == 'awaiting_lan..._confirmation'
- awaiting_landlord_confirmation + pending

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_round7.py:198: in test_tenant_sees_info_request_message assert target.get("status") == "awaiting_landlord_confirmation", \ E AssertionError: status should stay awaiting_landlord_confirmation after request-info, got pending E assert 'pending' == 'awaiting_lan..._confirmation' E E - awaiting_landlord_confirmation E + pending
